title: Simple Horseshoes
body:
Adds enchantable horseshoes to minecraft!

This is my first minecraft mod, I started learning java recently and wanted to give myself a fun weekend challange.

If any texture artist is willing to create a nicer texture for the horseshoe I will gladly add it and credit you!

Any other bug reports or feature reccomendations are welcome!

![image1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77331638dfd1709991fd17d1b6784b7084dec5ed.png)

Horseshoes can be enchanted with any boot enchantment.
![Image 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b00145a0068ed5892d0ab7102b50eca7b827f79b_0.webp)

It also protects the horses from the terrain!

- Can be found in Overworld Chests.
- Traded for from armour villager.
- Can be crafted with 7 Gold Ingots.
- Can be Smelted for Gold Nugget.
- Can be bartered for by a Piglin.

AI Use Disclosure

Portions of this code were developed with the assistance of artificial intelligence tools. AI was used specifically to help identify and resolve bugs, suggest debugging approaches, and clarify implementation details during the development process, In addition some inital development assets were created by artificial intelligence tools.
